name: com.kidzdev.unity.screen-navigator
description: Stack-based UI/scene navigation for Unity — push/pop history with a back button, async transitions, and an injectable animation seam. UniTask-only, zero singleton coupling.

samples.description: A stack navigator driving a Mail feature: Inbox → Message → Delete-confirm, with CanvasGroup fades, a hardware/UI back button, and full push/pop history.
